8: package org.sonatype.maven.polyglot.yaml;
9: 
10: import org.apache.maven.model.Contributor;
11: import org.apache.maven.model.Dependency;
12: import org.apache.maven.model.Developer;
13: import org.apache.maven.model.Model;
14: import org.apache.maven.model.Plugin;
15: import org.codehaus.plexus.util.xml.Xpp3Dom;
16: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.error.YAMLException;
17: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.introspector.Property;
18: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.nodes.Node;
19: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.nodes.NodeTuple;
20: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.nodes.Tag;
21: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.representer.Represent;
22: import org.yaml.snakeyaml.representer.Representer;
23: 
24: import java.beans.IntrospectionException;
25: import java.util.*;
26: 
27: import static java.lang.String.format;
28: 
29: /**
30:  * YAML model representer.
31:  *
32:  * @author jvanzyl
33:  * @author bentmann
34:  * @since 0.7
35:  */
36: class ModelRepresenter extends Representer {
37:   public ModelRepresenter() {
38:     this.representers.put(Xpp3Dom.class, new RepresentXpp3Dom());
39:     Represent stringRepresenter = this.representers.get(String.class);
40:     this.representers.put(Boolean.class, stringRepresenter);
41:     this.multiRepresenters.put(Number.class, stringRepresenter);
42:     this.multiRepresenters.put(Date.class, stringRepresenter);
43:     this.multiRepresenters.put(Enum.class, stringRepresenter);
44:     this.multiRepresenters.put(Calendar.class, stringRepresenter);
45:   }
46: 
47:   protected NodeTuple representJavaBeanProperty(Object javaBean, Property property,
48:                                                 Object propertyValue, Tag customTag) {
49:     if (property != null && property.getName().equals("pomFile")) {
50:       // "pomFile" is not a part of POM http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd
51:       return null;
52:     }
53: 
54:     if (propertyValue == null) return null;
55:     if (propertyValue instanceof Map) {
56:       Map map = (Map) propertyValue;
57:       if (map.isEmpty()) return null;
58:     }
59:     if (propertyValue instanceof List) {
60:       List map = (List) propertyValue;
61:       if (map.isEmpty()) return null;
62:     }
63:     if (javaBean instanceof Dependency) {
64:       //skip optional if it is false
65:       if (skipBoolean(property, "optional", propertyValue, false)) return null;
66:       //skip type if it is jar
67:       if (skipString(property, "type", propertyValue, "jar")) return null;
68:     }
69:     if (javaBean instanceof Plugin) {
70:       //skip extensions if it is false
71:       if (skipBoolean(property, "extensions", propertyValue, false)) return null;
72:       //skip inherited if it is true
73:       if (skipBoolean(property, "inherited", propertyValue, true)) return null;
74:     }
75:     return super.representJavaBeanProperty(javaBean, property, propertyValue, customTag);
76:   }
77: 
78:   private boolean skipString(Property property, String name, Object propertyValue, String value) {
79:     if (name.equals(property.getName())) {
80:       String v = (String) propertyValue;
81:       return (value.equals(v));
82:     }
83:     return false;
84:   }
85: 
86:   private boolean skipBoolean(Property property, String name, Object propertyValue, boolean value) {
87:     if (name.equals(property.getName())) {
88:       Boolean v = (Boolean) propertyValue;
89:       return (v.equals(value));
90:     }
91:     return false;
92:   }
93: 
94: 
95:   private class RepresentXpp3Dom implements Represent {
96:     private static final String ATTRIBUTE_PREFIX = "attr/";
97: 
98:     public Node representData(Object data) {
99:       return representMapping(Tag.MAP, toMap((Xpp3Dom) data), null);
100:     }
101: 
102:     private Map<String, Object> toMap(Xpp3Dom node) {
103:       Map<String, Object> map = new LinkedHashMap<>();
104: 
105:       int n = node.getChildCount();
106:       for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
107:         Xpp3Dom child = node.getChild(i);
108:         String childName = child.getName();
109: 
110:         String singularName = null;
111:         int childNameLength = childName.length();
112:         if ("reportPlugins".equals(childName)) {
113:           singularName = "plugin";
114:         } else if (childNameLength > 3 && childName.endsWith("ies")) {
115:           singularName = childName.substring(0, childNameLength - 3);
116:         } else if (childNameLength > 1 && childName.endsWith("s")) {
117:           singularName = childName.substring(0, childNameLength - 1);
118:         }
119: 
120:         Object childValue = child.getValue();
121:         if (childValue == null) {
122:           boolean isList = singularName != null;
123:           if (isList) { // check for eventual list construction
124:             for (int j = 0, grandChildCount = child.getChildCount(); j < grandChildCount; j++) {
125:               String grandChildName = child.getChild(j).getName();
126:               isList &= grandChildName.equals(singularName);
127:             }
128:           }
129:           if (isList) {
130:             childValue = toList(child, singularName);
131:           } else {
132:             childValue = toMap(child);
133:           }
134:         }
135:         map.put(childName, childValue);
136:       }
137: 
138:       for (String attrName : node.getAttributeNames()) {
139:         map.put(ATTRIBUTE_PREFIX + attrName, node.getAttribute(attrName));
140:       }
141: 
142:       return map;
143:     }
144: 
145:     private List<Object> toList(Xpp3Dom node, String childName) {
146:       List<Object> list = new ArrayList<>();
147: 
148:       int n = node.getChildCount();
149:       for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
150:         Xpp3Dom child = node.getChild(i);
151: 
152:         if (!childName.equals(child.getName())) {
153:           throw new YAMLException(format("child name: '%s' does not match expected name: '%s' at node %s",
154:               child.getName(), childName, node));
155:         }
156: 
157:         Object childValue = child.getValue();
158:         if (childValue == null) {
159:           childValue = toMap(child);
160:         }
161:         list.add(childValue);
162:       }
163: 
164:       return list;
165:     }
166:   }
167: 
168:   // Model elements order {
169:   //TODO move to polyglot-common, or to org.apache.maven:maven-model
170:   private static List<String> ORDER_MODEL = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList(
171: 		  "modelEncoding",
172:           "modelVersion",
173:           "parent",
174:           "groupId",
175:           "artifactId",
176:           "version",
177:           "packaging",
178: 
179:           "name",
180:           "description",
181:           "url",
182:           "inceptionYear",
183:           "organization",
184:           "licenses",
185:           "developers",
186:           "contributers",
187:           "mailingLists",
188:           "scm",
189:           "issueManagement",
190:           "ciManagement",
191: 
192:           "properties",
193:           "prerequisites",
194:           "modules",
195:           "dependencyManagement",
196:           "dependencies",
197:           "distributionManagement",
198:           //"repositories",
199:           //"pluginRepositories",
200:           "build",
201:           "profiles",
202:           "reporting"
203:           ));
204:   private static List<String> ORDER_DEVELOPER = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList(
205: 		  "name", "id", "email"));
206:   private static List<String> ORDER_CONTRIBUTOR = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList(
207: 		  "name", "id", "email"));
208:   private static List<String> ORDER_DEPENDENCY = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList(
209: 		  "groupId", "artifactId", "version", "type", "classifier", "scope"));
210:   private static List<String> ORDER_PLUGIN = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList(
211: 		  "groupId", "artifactId", "version", "inherited", "extensions", "configuration"));
212:   //}
213: 
214:   /*
215:    * Change the default order. Important data goes first.
216:    */
217:   @Override
218:   protected Set<Property> getProperties(Class<? extends Object> type)
219:           throws IntrospectionException {
220:     if (type.isAssignableFrom(Model.class)) {
221:       return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_MODEL);
222:     } else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Developer.class)) {
223:       return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_DEVELOPER);
224:     } else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Contributor.class)) {
225:       return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_CONTRIBUTOR);
226:     }  else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Dependency.class)) {
227:       return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_DEPENDENCY);
228:     }  else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Plugin.class)) {
229:       return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_PLUGIN);
230:     } else {
231:       return super.getProperties(type);
232:     }
233:   }
234: 
235:   private Set<Property> sortTypeWithOrder(Class<? extends Object> type, List<String> order)
236:           throws IntrospectionException {
237:       Set<Property> standard = super.getProperties(type);
238:       Set<Property> sorted = new TreeSet<Property>(new ModelPropertyComparator(order));
239:       sorted.addAll(standard);
240:       return sorted;
241:   }
242: 
243:   private class ModelPropertyComparator implements Comparator<Property> {
244:     private List<String> names;
245: 
246:     public ModelPropertyComparator(List<String> names) {
247:       this.names = names;
248:     }
249: 
250:     public int compare(Property o1, Property o2) {
251:       // important go first
252:       for (String name : names) {
253:         int c = compareByName(o1, o2, name);
254:         if (c != 0) {
255:           return c;
256:         }
257:       }
258:       // all the rest
259:       return o1.compareTo(o2);
260:     }
261: 
262:     private int compareByName(Property o1, Property o2, String name) {
263:       if (o1.getName().equals(name)) {
264:         return -1;
265:       } else if (o2.getName().equals(name)) {
266:         return 1;
267:       }
268:       return 0;// compare further
269:     }
270:   }
271: }

165:     private static List<String> ORDER_MODEL = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList("modelEncoding", "modelVersion", "parent", "groupId", "artifactId", "version", "packaging", "name", "description", "url", "inceptionYear", "organization", "licenses", "developers", "contributers", "mailingLists", "scm", "issueManagement", "ciManagement", "properties", "prerequisites", "modules", "dependencyManagement", "dependencies", "distributionManagement", //"repositories",

170: 
171:     private static List<String> ORDER_CONTRIBUTOR = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList("name", "id", "email"));
172: 
173:     private static List<String> ORDER_DEPENDENCY = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList("groupId", "artifactId", "version", "type", "classifier", "scope"));
174: 
175:     private static List<String> ORDER_PLUGIN = new ArrayList<String>(Arrays.asList("groupId", "artifactId", "version", "inherited", "extensions", "configuration"));
176: 
177:     //}
178:     /*
179:    * Change the default order. Important data goes first.
180:    */
181:     @Override
182:     protected Set<Property> getProperties(Class<? extends Object> type) {
183:         if (type.isAssignableFrom(Model.class)) {
184:             return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_MODEL);
185:         } else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Developer.class)) {
186:             return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_DEVELOPER);
187:         } else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Contributor.class)) {
188:             return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_CONTRIBUTOR);
189:         } else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Dependency.class)) {
190:             return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_DEPENDENCY);
191:         } else if (type.isAssignableFrom(Plugin.class)) {
192:             return sortTypeWithOrder(type, ORDER_PLUGIN);
193:         } else {
194:             return super.getProperties(type);
195:         }
196:     }
197: 
198:     private Set<Property> sortTypeWithOrder(Class<? extends Object> type, List<String> order) throws IntrospectionException {
199:         Set<Property> standard = super.getProperties(type);
200:         Set<Property> sorted = new TreeSet<Property>(new ModelPropertyComparator(order));
201:         sorted.addAll(standard);
202:         return sorted;
203:     }
204: 
205:     private class ModelPropertyComparator implements Comparator<Property> {
206: 
207:         private List<String> names;
208: 
209:         public ModelPropertyComparator(List<String> names) {
210:             this.names = names;
211:         }
212: 
213:         public int compare(Property o1, Property o2) {
214:             // important go first
215:             for (String name : names) {
216:                 int c = compareByName(o1, o2, name);
217:                 if (c != 0) {
218:                     return c;
219:                 }
220:             }
221:             // all the rest
222:             return o1.compareTo(o2);
223:         }
224: 
225:         private int compareByName(Property o1, Property o2, String name) {
226:             if (o1.getName().equals(name)) {
227:                 return -1;
228:             } else if (o2.getName().equals(name)) {
229:                 return 1;
230:             }
231:             // compare further

233:         }
234:     }
235: }

**Compilation Error Found:**
- File: `/workspace/polyglot-maven/polyglot-yaml/src/main/java/org/sonatype/maven/polyglot/yaml/ModelRepresenter.java:218`
- Error: `Exception IntrospectionException is not compatible with throws clause in Representer.getProperties()`

**Fix Applied:**
The `getProperties` method declared `throws IntrospectionException` but the parent class method doesn't have this in its throws clause. The fix removed the incompatible `throws` declaration.

**JavaParser Transformation:**
- Created at: `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java`
- The transformation parses Java files, finds methods with incompatible `throws IntrospectionException` declarations, and removes them.
